Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Suu]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Suu is being cradled by Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Mercy uses Suu as a bow.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Suu is a bow inherited by Mercy from her Monarch mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Suu is woven from slick black strands and has a violet-eyed dragon's head in the center of its shaft.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Suu is an item held by Akura Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Suu is an object rolled between Mercy's hands.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Suu is a staff of twisted black madra used by Mercy.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy drags Suu along the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Suu is a staff that can take a bow form with a draconic head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Suu is an item that Mercy does not carry during the ceremony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Suu is a staff that can bend into a bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Suu is associated with a bow that fires violet arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Suu is a mount ridden by Mercy.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy flies on Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy was pulling the last inch of Suu free.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy braced herself on Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Suu is Mercy's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Suu is a character who appears in the form of a walking stick.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Suu is a bow that the Seed of Honor monument resembles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy pulled Suu to a halt in midair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy rides on the back of Suu.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Mercy is raising Suu to the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy raised her old companion, Suu.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Suu is a creature that hisses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Suu can take a staff form.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
